sections.paragraph:
Original: ענּי

Transliteration: ‛ûnnı̂y

Phonetic: oon-nee'

BDB Definition:

Unni = "afflicted"
  1. a Levite doorkeeper in the time of David
  2. a Levite concerned in the sacred office after the return from exile in Babylon

Origin: from H6031

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
